title: Mafish Crafting (马夫鱼：合成)
description:
🐟📘 一个马夫鱼模组的附属，让这个模组的物品可以在生存模式下获得  
A mafish-learning extras adds a few recipes for survival
body:
# 🐟 Mafish Crafting
## 🌐 EN
Adds a few recipes for mafish-learning  
**NEO-MAFISH-LEARNING 0.0.5 OR HIGHER REQUIRED!**

### 📘 This mod added recipes like
You also can see gallery  
  - Mafish (Fishing or Fisher's House)
  - Cheese burger
  - Zhuge crossbow
  - Time stop gem
  - And other things, please use [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or other mods to view

### ❓ Some FAQs
Can I add this mod to my modpack?  
  - Sure, but please tell users this isn't your mod. You also can JIJ (Jar In Jar) this mod.

Wait, why github-repo's name is mafish-extras?  
  - I will integrate these attachments together in the future, so I have consolidated all the source code of the attachments into one repository

### ℹ️ Tips
This mod's icon uses VanillaXBR's texture

And "Join Discord server" Button is My KOOK server, **NOT Discord**  
So you maybe cannot join the KOOK server

I created a Discord server, but I don't often look at it  
LINK: [https://discord.gg/P93nwYxWmQ](https://discord.gg/P93nwYxWmQ)

## 🌐 ZH
加入了一些配方用于马夫鱼模组  
**需要Neoforge版马夫鱼学习模组 0.0.5 以上的版本！**

### 📘 加入的部分配方
具体怎么合成可以看看图库  
  - 马夫鱼 (钓鱼或在渔夫小屋内获得)
  - 芝士汉堡儿
  - 诸葛连弩
  - 时间宝石
  - 还有其他的东西，请使用[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)或类似的模组来查看

### ❓ FAQ
我可以把这个Mod加入整合包吗？
  - 可以，只要证明你的Mod不是你创作的，甚至你直接JIJ (jar in jar)了都可以

等下，这个Mod的Github仓库名是mafish-extras？
  - 我以后会把这些附属整合到一起，所以我就把所有附属的源代码放到了一个仓库

### ℹ️ 一些提示
此Mod的图标使用了VanillaXBR的纹理

此外 "Join Discord server"按钮实际上是我的KOOK服务器，而非Discord  
所以你无需担心连接不上的问题

当然，如果你有能力访问Discord，你可以点击[这里](https://discord.gg/P93nwYxWmQ)进入Discord服务器  
但是我一般都直接看KOOK，所以DC优先级不高
